programme.title: Quo Vadis TV
programme.desc: Quo Vadis TV is committed to sharing the Biblical message in a way that makes Christian living practical, realistic, and attainable. Our theme is summarized the question: "where are you going?" Our Aim with this inquiry is to help people find orientation and find the path back to God.

programme.title: REV
programme.desc: Life isn't about the destination, but the journey to get there, something Rev completely adheres to. The show brings you updates from the world of cars, examining the latest news and events pertaining to vehicles. From test driving the latest vehicles to examining how engineering is changing to combat climate change, Rev explores every avenue of car-based news, keeping fellow petrol heads up to date with developments within the industry.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. programme.title: Eco Africa
programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. In Africa especially, huge numbers of animal and wildlife species have dramatically fallen, largely due to a vast increase in human population across the continent. The increasing population is taking over vast swathes of natural land and in turn, adding to the demand for natural resources. This series explores the different concepts being used to help sustain our future, such as alternative resources, biodiversity conservation and the future of travel.

programme.title: The Day
programme.desc: The news as it happened, presented, clarified and analysed by experts and specialists. Studio-based and in-the field summaries and analysis of the events to have marked the previous twenty-four hours enable understanding and place within a wider context the issues that have shaped, focused and given direction over the course of the previous day.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.desc: Consumption of goods by people is drastically influencing environment. programme.title: Arts Unveiled: Experiencing and understanding the art world

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.title: HER Women in Asia
programme.desc: My Body A series that tells the stories of women from Asia who are breaking stereotypes and voicing their opinions loud and clear. In each episode, three women share their perspectives on universal and existential topics. The series portrays the lives of women from from all spheres of Asian societies, featuring protagonists from India, Indonesia, Malaysia, Pakistan, the Philippines, Singapore, Taiwan and Thailand. What challenges do women scientists face, what stories do female politicians have to tell, and what impact do migration and poverty have on women? Find out on HER - Women in Asia.

It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is more important, reliable source of news.

programme.title: Shift
programme.desc: The program focuses on a single topic - in depth and in detail. We talk to experts, present the key facts and explain complicated subjects in a simple manner. SHIFT - substantial, never superficial.

programme.title: The 77 Percent
programme.desc: 77 per cent of Africa's population are below the age of thirty-five yet their interests are under-represented poltically and economically. This show aims to redress the balance by providing a voice to the largest demographic group on the continent. These dynamic younger people are politically engaged and will determine the future path their countries, and the continent as a whole, will follow in the twenty-first century. Presented by Eddy Micah Jr. from Ghana and Wanjiku Mwaura from Kenya, the show promotes a pan-African agenda by encouraging dialogue between the various interested parties. The show pulls no punches when delivering its compelling reports, personal accounts and provocative discussions. A long overdue look at the big issues that affect the youth of Africa.

programme.title: Reporter: On Location
programme.desc: It is all about dedicated reporters who are at the top table of world affairs and provide on-the-spot commentary from different parts of Germany, Europe and around the globe. With their camera on, they are always ready to inform the viewers about top events and key stories in various spheres of life.

programme.title: Sports Life
programme.desc: Sports Life explores the world of sport, bringing you updates, interviews and reports from across the globe. Sport has the power to break down barriers, improve lives, connect communities, and of course, improve health. The show delves into all aspects of sport, from professionals competing at the very top to everyday individuals simply enjoying a pastime, demonstrating how sport and life are regularly connected.

programme.title: Tomorrow Today
programme.desc: If you are into cosmos and universe, then this show is made for you. Find out if it is possible to predict solar storms, whether plants are smart, if synthetic fuels can help protect environment, what are the results of the largest-ever polar expedition, and many more questions in different spheres of life.

programme.title: Reviving Switzerland's Isolated Villages
programme.desc: Only about 650 people live year-round in the Onsernone Valley in Switzerland. Surrounded by picturesque but rugged nature, life here is not easy for the inhabitants. And one of the top priorities is ensuring the availability of medical care.

programme.title: In Good Shape
programme.desc: Informative and entertaining, In Good Shape reports on the most interesting developments in medicine, nutrition and fitness. In our regular interviews, we talk to medical professionals who give us their expert opinions. In Good Shape also debunks health myths and offers tips on what foods will give your body a boost - all based on the latest scientific insights.

programme.title: HER Women in Asia
programme.desc: My Body A series that tells the stories of women from Asia who are breaking stereotypes and voicing their opinions loud and clear. In each episode, three women share their perspectives on universal and existential topics. The series portrays the lives of women from from all spheres of Asian societies, featuring protagonists from India, Indonesia, Malaysia, Pakistan, the Philippines, Singapore, Taiwan and Thailand. What challenges do women scientists face, what stories do female politicians have to tell, and what impact do migration and poverty have on women? Find out on HER - Women in Asia.

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: 8/25. Friends Phoebe, Katie, Sam and Cal take on the Bridge of Lies. One by one, they must cross the Bridge, stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: 31/54. Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Ria Lina for the brainy quiz where contestants score points by coming up with the answers no-one else could think of.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Roman Kemp bring you the stories that matter from across the country.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Kat plans a birthday dinner for Jasmine, Oscar wrestles with the feelings he has for both Josh and Jasmine, and Jack tries to get through to Denise. [S,AD]

programme.title: Interior Design Masters with Alan Carr
programme.desc: 8/8. The finalists head to Longleat to transform cottages before one is crowned the winner. [S,AD]

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Joe Swash goes in search of his Italian roots. Along the way, he finds stories of murder, banditry, an inspiring political activist and a family bar in southern Italy. [S,AD]

programme.title: BBC News and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, with reports from BBC correspondents worldwide.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: England 2006: The Golden Generation
programme.desc: Why did the England football team not fulfil their potential at the 2006 World Cup? Contains some strong language. [S,AD]

programme.title: Escape Room: Tournament of Champions
programme.desc: Six people unwillingly find themselves locked in a series of deadly escape rooms. Contains some strong language, some violence and some upsetting scenes. [2021]

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier.

programme.title: Doorbell Detectives
programme.desc: 8/12. Phil returns home to find someone hanging around his house. When he checks his doorbell footage, he sees the burglar drop some incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: An old Sunday school in Cornwall undergoes a heavenly transformation. Two other unique properties in Hampshire and Lancashire are up for auction with interesting plans afoot. [S,AD]

programme.title: Bargain Hunt: Tea Special
programme.desc: Danny Sebastian brews up fun and memories of bygone buys in this special show all about tea. [S,AD]

programme.title: BBC News at One including BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Policing Paradise
programme.desc: 3/15. A haul of suspected cannabis plants is found at a residential home, stolen bike parts are discovered in a derelict hotel, and dogs sniff out drugs at the airport.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: 9/15. Robson takes fellow actor Jo Joyner horse riding in the shadow of the Cheviots as he introduces her to Northumberland. An outdoor cookery lesson sees the pair make soda bread. [S,AD]

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: 48/55. Today's buyer is ready to fulfil a lifelong dream of moving to the Lake District, where Sonali Shah helps her explore homes in pretty villages, including a unique mystery house.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: 8/35. Flo Headlam and Joe Swift are in Wilmslow to help Vin and Reena transform their chaotic patch of grass, gravel and concrete into a zen and grow-your-own garden for family healing.

programme.title: Aces High
programme.desc: A whiskey-fortified British ace (Malcolm McDowell) leads the 76 Squadron on dogfights in World War I France.

programme.title: Yellowstone Kelly
programme.desc: A trapper (Clint Walker) and his helper (Edd Byrnes) try to help an Indian girl escape from a Dakota chief (John Russell) and a warrior.

programme.title: Man in the Saddle
programme.desc: A wounded rancher (Randolph Scott) hides with a schoolmarm (Ellen Drew) after his ex-girlfriend's husband (Alexander Knox) runs him out of town.

programme.title: Raw Edge
programme.desc: In 1842 lawless Oregon, a gunfighter seeks vengeance when his innocent brother is lynched and his beautiful Indian wife is claimed by the local tyrant.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

programme.title: The 7th Voyage of Sinbad
programme.desc: Sailing to Baghdad after a narrow escape from the monster island of Colossa, the wedding plans of legendary hero Sinbad and Princess Parisa are spoiled by the scheming sorcerer Sokurah. In return for his previous help with the cyclops on Colossa, Sokurah demands that Sinbad retrieve a lamp he lost on the island. When Sinbad refuses, the conjurer shrinks Parisa, forcing the sailor and his crew back to the high seas in order to save her.

programme.title: Yellowstone Kelly
programme.desc: Union soldier Maj. Towns (Rhodes Reason) asks fur trapper and Indian scout Luther "Yellowstone" Kelly (Clint Walker) to scout for the Army in Sioux territory. Kelly ventures into the area, only to be taken prisoner by the Sioux. Since Kelly saved the life of Chief Gall (John Russell) years before, the chief promises to free him if Kelly treats wounded Arapaho maiden Wahleeah (Andra Martin). Soon Kelly and the recovered Wahleeah are caught between Towns' soldiers and the vengeful Sioux.

programme.title: Count of Monte Cristo
programme.desc: After the death of its captain, seafarer Edmond Dantes successfully brings in the merchant vessel belonging to his employers only to find himself framed for the murder. Jailed on a remote island, he meets fellow prisoner Abbe Faria who provides Edmond with the education he never had as well as hope of escaping to find a buried fortune. When Edmond finally does break free, he locates the treasure and vows to avenge himself with it.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A battered hat and a Christmas goose are Holmes' only clues to clearing a falsely accused man.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Lonesome Trail
programme.desc: A group of conniving land-grabbers is deterred from further evil by a Western Robin Hood armed with a bow and arrow.

programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Earp must negotiate with Chief Dull Knife when a Cheyenne tribe launches an attack to retake their ancestral lands, hoping to avoid a confrontation with Maj. Benteen's soldiers.

programme.title: Paid Programming: Carshield -- Cars Have Changed
The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: When Doc purchases a gold brick from a wanted thief and then sells it to prove a point, Earp follows the brick's trail as it passes through the hands of various Dodge City residents.

programme.title: The 7th Voyage of Sinbad
programme.desc: Sailing to Baghdad after a narrow escape from the monster island of Colossa, the wedding plans of legendary hero Sinbad and Princess Parisa are spoiled by the scheming sorcerer Sokurah. In return for his previous help with the cyclops on Colossa, Sokurah demands that Sinbad retrieve a lamp he lost on the island. When Sinbad refuses, the conjurer shrinks Parisa, forcing the sailor and his crew back to the high seas in order to save her.

programme.title: Forbidden Trail
programme.desc: A practical-joking cowboy (Buck Jones) gets serious with outlaws.

programme.title: Roughshod
programme.desc: Rancher Clay (Robert Sterling) and his brother, Steve (Claude Jarman Jr.), head out across the Sonora mountain pass, followed by Lednov (John Ireland), an ex-con seeking revenge on Clay for putting him behind bars. Clay and Steve unexpectedly cross paths with a group of dance hall girls -- including Mary (Gloria Grahame), Marcia (Martha Hyer) and Helen (Myrna Dell) -- whose stagecoach has broken down, and help them get to the nearest ranch, where Lednov unfortunately catches up to Clay.

programme.title: Three Hours to Kill
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a small western community turn on Jim Guthrie (Dana Andrews) when he becomes the prime suspect for a murder he didn't commit. Before getting a chance to prove his innocence, Jim is driven from his home and into the wilderness, where he is left for dead. Despite the danger, he comes back years later, discovering that he's still a wanted man. But a kindhearted local named Chris (Dianne Foster) believes his story, and together they begin a desperate search for the true culprit.

programme.title: Raw Edge
programme.desc: In 1842 lawless Oregon, a gunfighter seeks vengeance when his innocent brother is lynched and his beautiful Indian wife is claimed by the local tyrant.

programme.title: Trail Street
programme.desc: Legendary lawman Bat Masterson (Randolph Scott) is called to rural Kansas to defend farmers from ruthless cattlemen. Joining Masterson in his efforts to clean up a lawless town are a couple of locals: Masterson's old chum Billy Burn and landowner Allen Harper (Robert Ryan). But ranch owner Logan Maury proves to be a more than formidable opponent. He'll stop at nothing, including murder, to turn the farmers' fields into grazing grounds for his cattle.

programme.title: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: When beautiful Kay Banks (Elizabeth Taylor) announces her engagement to Buckley Dunstan (Don Taylor), her doting middle-class father, Stan (Spencer Tracy), must contend with a variety of problems, ranging from money issues to wedding planning difficulties. As things get hectic, Stan's wife, Ellie (Joan Bennett), tries to be the calm in the center of the storm. At the heart of the comedy, though, is Stan's emotional tie to his little girl, and his realization that she has indeed grown up.

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: After saving the life of his royal father's usurper, Pelias (Douglas Wilmer), whom he fails to recognize, Jason (Todd Armstrong) is encouraged by the conniving murderer to begin a quest in search of the Golden Fleece. In doing so, Pelias hopes for Jason's death to thwart the prophecy that he will reclaim the throne. Along the journey, Jason is protected by the goddess Hera (Honor Blackman), and his crew includes Hercules (Nigel Green) and Acastus (Gary Raymond), a saboteur planted by Pelias.

programme.title: Roughshod
programme.desc: Rancher Clay (Robert Sterling) and his brother, Steve (Claude Jarman Jr.), head out across the Sonora mountain pass, followed by Lednov (John Ireland), an ex-con seeking revenge on Clay for putting him behind bars. Clay and Steve unexpectedly cross paths with a group of dance hall girls -- including Mary (Gloria Grahame), Marcia (Martha Hyer) and Helen (Myrna Dell) -- whose stagecoach has broken down, and help them get to the nearest ranch, where Lednov unfortunately catches up to Clay.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes (Basil Rathbone) saves noted Swiss physicist Franz Tobel (William Post Jr.) from the Gestapo in Zurich and smuggles him to London. There, Tobel is reunited with his wife, Charlotte (Kaaren Verne), to whom he gives a coded message in the event he disappears. Tobel presents the weapon he developed to government officials, and when he is subsequently abducted by arch-villain Professor Moriarty (Lionel Atwill), Holmes and Dr. Watson (Nigel Bruce) risk their lives to find him.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes

programme.title: Renegades

Together Ben and Hannah set off to forge a new life, but prejudice and strangling family ties soon bring trouble to these newlyweds.

programme.title: Renegades
programme.desc: The girlfriend (Evelyn Keyes) of a frontier doctor (Willard Parker) falls for a member (Larry Parks) of an outlaw clan.

programme.title: Day of the Badman
programme.desc: A cow-town judge (Fred MacMurray) stands alone against four related outlaws who aim to free a killer about to hang.

programme.title: Rooster Cogburn
programme.desc: Sequel to the Oscar-winning "True Grit" finds the trigger-happy Rooster trying to win back his law badge by hunting a gang of bandits and a stolen shipment of explosives. His job is not made any easier by the daughter of one of the gang's victims, who insists on coming along for the ride.

programme.title: Man of the West
programme.desc: Ex-outlaw Link Jones (Gary Cooper) is aboard a train when it is robbed by bandits. When he tries to intervene, he's knocked out and left in the middle of nowhere with saloon singer Billie (Julie London), whom he hoped to hire as a schoolteacher in his town, and Sam (Arthur O'Connell), a con man. Link brings the three to his nearby former home, now the hideout for the bandits, who are led by his uncle (Lee J. Cobb) -- and to save his new friends, he must rejoin the old gang for one last holdup.

programme.title: Friendly Fire
programme.desc: Based on true events, this drama chronicles the attempts of Gene and Peg Mullen, an Iowa couple whose son Michael has been killed by American "friendly fire" in Vietnam, to hunt down the details of his death. When the U.S. government evades their direct questions, the Mullens spend years searching for the facts, and, as they gradually piece together events, they grow increasingly embittered toward the war that robbed them of their boy.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes proves a retired builder was not murdered by the young solicitor named in his will.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: Day of the Badman
programme.desc: Judge Jim Scott (Fred MacMurray) wants to sentence a killer to die, but the outlaw's family members intend otherwise. All-powerful patriarch Charlie Hayes (Robert Middleton) and his intimidating kinfolk are confident they can use violence to get their doomed relative's sentence commuted into something less severe. Although Sheriff Barney Wiley (John Ericson) wilts under the family's strong-arm tactics, Scott remains determined to see justice done at the end of a rope.

programme.title: Beach Party
programme.desc: Dolores (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon), attractive young surfers in Southern California, are just out for a good time. Their relaxed lifestyle fascinates Professor Sutwell (Bob Cummings), an anthropologist who decides to study the social lives of teens. A series of beach-themed films would follow the blueprint set by this one, which hinges on romantic rivalries, rugged motorcyclists, an attempted crime and plenty of handsome people.

programme.title: Whispering Smith
programme.desc: Luke Whispering Smith (Alan Ladd) is a mild-mannered policeman tasked with stopping a gang of train robbers, led by Barney Rebstock (Donald Crisp). Luke is faced with a conflict of interest when his good friend, Murray Sinclair (Robert Preston), loses his railroad job and, in an act of defiance, joins Rebstock's gang of outlaws. To make things even more complicated, Luke's friendship with Murray's ex-wife, Marian (Brenda Marshall), is becoming romantic.

programme.title: Ride the High Country
programme.desc: Reduced to transporting gold from a distant mine to a small-town bank, retired lawman Steve Judd (Joel McCrea) recruits friend Gil Westrum (Randolph Scott), who has been performing in a traveling carnival. Unknown to Steve, the restless Gil and a young drifter intend to steal the next gold transport. On the way, the men help Elsa Knudsen (Mariette Hartley) to break free from her zealot father and join her fiancé at the mine, not realizing the consequences that await them all.

programme.title: Beach Party
programme.desc: Dolores (Annette Funicello) and Frankie (Frankie Avalon), attractive young surfers in Southern California, are just out for a good time. A series of beach-themed films would follow the blueprint set by this one, which hinges on romantic rivalries, rugged motorcyclists, an attempted crime and plenty of handsome people.

programme.title: Voyage of the Damned
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a ship carrying German-Jewish refugees which was sent to Havana in 1939 by the Nazis but was denied permission to land anywhere. The ship was eventually obliged to return to Germany, where certain death awaited its passengers. This terrible outcome had been cynically anticipated by the Nazis when granting permission for the voyage in the first place.

programme.title: Hope and Health With Mathew Embry
programme.desc: Angie Gensler is a mother and personal trainer who was diagnosed with multiple sclerosis in 2004. In this episode, Mathew Embry speaks with Angie about her diagnosis and why she ultimately chose not to pursue drug treatments. Instead, she focused on lifestyle changes including diet, exercise, and daily discipline. Along the way she faced several major challenges, all while continuing to pursue optimal health and eventually stepping onto the competitive bodybuilding stage in her 50s.

programme.desc: The fishing world has become quite a complex place these days, especially with all the new lure introductions each season, which is where the In-Fisherman staff steps in, with years of on-the-water experience to cut through some of the haze, getting picky about a presentation system for big-water walleyes; detailing how-to aspects of using live sonar for deep-water crappies; and highlighting vortexing for largemouths, a pioneering idea, indeed.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Two powerful tornadoes take aim at a Nebraska farming community at the same time; a super-rare but super-dangerous tornado of fire terrorizes a California town.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: A flash flood in the Texas Hill Country kills 13 people and destroys 350 homes; when a twister hits a small town in Mississippi, a family takes shelter in a diner's walk-in cooler; when they emerge, the town is gone.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Elite skiers on a back-country adventure are hit by an avalanche; the myth that a tornado can never strike in the mountains comes crashing down when a twister strikes a Kentucky town in the Appalachian foothills.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: A flash flood at an Arkansas campsite leaves 20 dead; when a tornado pulverizes a tiny Alabama town, a doctor rescues a teenage girl who was left for dead.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Amid raging floodwaters in West Virginia, a father and son try to save a woman from drowning; in Dayton, Ohio, a very young storm chaser alerts the community to a tornado that the experts didn't see coming.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Police body cam footage captures the rescue of a mother and her four young children from Tropical Storm Imelda near Houston; a mother in a small town near Little Rock, Ark., tries in vain to save all nine of her children from an EF4 twister.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: During a tornado outbreak in Oklahoma, a young man races to save his cousin who has autism, trapped in a house just as a twister is about to slam into it; a former roadie for the Grateful Dead uses a garden hose to save his house from a wildfire.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: A Dallas man who heads outside to get a pizza during halftime of a Cowboys-Eagles football game spots an EF-3 tornado barreling through the city; a trauma nurse jumps into action as a rare Christmastime twister devastates a small Mississippi town.

programme.title: Tornado Alley
programme.desc: A shelter provides refuge from the storm until it becomes a trap; a grandmother who runs a daycare, saves herself and three toddlers by taking cover in a bathtub; a neighbor feels guilty for leaving a woman caught outside.

programme.title: Tornado Alley
programme.desc: A single mother and her two sons get sucked into the vortex of a tornado and survive; a family from Mississippi learns that survival sometimes means needing help; preparation for a disaster means endurance for a community in Texas.

programme.desc: Mother risks her life to save her two children as her house is torn to pieces; family risks their lives to save their neighbors; mother and daughter learn the meaning of survival.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: In Tennessee, a violent tornado touches down in downtown Nashville - interrupting a live news broadcast and raking through the city; at the Hamma Hamma Falls, a kayaker races to rescue his friend from a terrifying ordeal.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: A violent tornado outbreak unleashes carnage on Oklahoma, Texas and Louisiana; A Swedish snow mobile rider gets lost in the mountains during a nighttime adventure; A record-breaking super typhoon brings down the roof on a wedding in the Philippines.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather
programme.desc: Australia's Kangaroo Island is ravaged by deadly bushfires; in Kansas, two tornado chasers let a tourist ride along with them as they intercept a monster tornado; two sailors navigate cyclone-force winds.

programme.desc: Elite skiers on a back-country adventure are hit by an avalanche; the myth that a tornado can never strike in the mountains comes crashing down when a twister strikes a Kentucky town in the Appalachian foothills.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: A flash flood at an Arkansas campsite leaves 20 dead; when a tornado pulverizes a tiny Alabama town, a doctor rescues a teenage girl who was left for dead.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Amid raging floodwaters in West Virginia, a father and son try to save a woman from drowning; in Dayton, Ohio, a very young storm chaser alerts the community to a tornado that the experts didn't see coming.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: Police body cam footage captures the rescue of a mother and her four young children from Tropical Storm Imelda near Houston; a mother in a small town near Little Rock, Ark., tries in vain to save all nine of her children from an EF4 twister.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: During a tornado outbreak in Oklahoma, a young man races to save his cousin who has autism, trapped in a house just as a twister is about to slam into it; a former roadie for the Grateful Dead uses a garden hose to save his house from a wildfire.

programme.title: Storm Stories: The Next Chapter
programme.desc: A Dallas man who heads outside to get a pizza during halftime of a Cowboys-Eagles football game spots an EF-3 tornado barreling through the city; a trauma nurse jumps into action as a rare Christmastime twister devastates a small Mississippi town.

programme.title: My Classic Car

programme.title: Stacey David's GearZ
programme.desc: The Thiokol Swamp Spryte is back in the shop for some much-needed restoration, and replacing the aluminum skin so she will float again; Stacey rolls in the Lil' Red Wagon for some new suspension and 50 years of Skyjacker history.

programme.title: Sam's Garage
programme.desc: Sam and Doug complete the last leg of The Great Race in Gardiner, Maine; Sam installs a Pypes Performance Exhaust on the 55' Bel Air; the SC300 gets new coilovers, wheels and tires; Sam explains some steering components from Mevotech.

programme.title: 2026 King of the Hammers
programme.desc: Only the strongest competitors and machines compete in this one-of-a-kind off-road race that requires both speed and survival to finish this true test of man and machine.

programme.desc: Part race and part survival contest, just finishing is a victory in itself; spanning 14 days and 5,000 miles, this marathon off-road event is a test of endurance that rewards precision and punishes mistakes.

programme.desc: S07 E08 Gator Raid With herds in two states, the cowboys must split up to handle all the work; Booger and Bubba track down a predator preying on calves in Florida; Cody processes a cattle shipment in Alabama; the gang helps Matthew with a school science project.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S01 E15 Charles M. Russell: The Cowboy Artist Charlie Russell is an aimless cowhand who enjoys painting scenes of his life on the range until his new bride, Nancy, gives him the push he needs to stop cowboying in order to focus on the artwork that will soon make him famous.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S01 E04 Lewis & Clark: Captains of Discovery As Meriwether Lewis and William Clark trek into the uncharted West, the rivers become too shallow for boats; they must find friendly Native Americans willing to trade for horses or risk spending winter on the wrong side of the Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: The Cowboy Way
programme.desc: S07 E10 Generations to Come Booger and Bubba try to keep up while Cody is busy with his specialty cattle sale; Cody packs the barn with buyers; Bubba renovates a room for the new baby; Booger adds personal stories to Grandma's cowboy cookbook.

programme.desc: S03 E06 Baranca A Mexican bandit and his gang ride into North Fork.

programme.desc: S01 E22 Spy, Counterspy, Counter Counterspy After being chosen by the Army to test a bullet-proof vest, F Troop is infiltrated by spies.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S02 E05 The Masterson Brothers Part 1 After Marshal Ed Masterson is shot while breaking up a barroom brawl, he hastily bans all firearms in Dodge City; Ed's swift proclamation is met with disdain by most townsfolk, including his own brothers, and places an even larger target on his back.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: S02 E06 The Masterson Brothers Part 2 After Marshal Ed Masterson is gunned down in Dodge City, his youngest brother, James, decides to follow in his footsteps and become a lawman; when James' life is threatened, middle brother Bat Masterson races back from Arizona to protect his kin.

programme.title: Into the Wild Frontier
programme.desc: S01 E01 John Colter: King of the Mountain Men Legendary mountain man John Colter survives many brushes with death, but nothing prepares him for what he faces now; after venturing into Blackfeet territory, he is stripped naked and forced to run for his life as warriors give chase.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The wedding plans of Morgan Earp and Lucy Tedder are disrupted by a new arrival: Lucy's husband.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: An outlaw's widow lures lovelorn Ned Buntline into a trap.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Mob justice threatens a religious fanatic suspected of instigating a massacre.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: Wyatt risks his badge to prove that a crazed gunman is not responsible for his violent actions.

programme.title: The 700 Club Israel
programme.desc: Hosted by Gordon Robertson, brings you weekly news, devotionals, interviews, and inspiring stories from the Holy Land. Discover what God is doing through CBN Israel and hear powerful testimonies of hope, faith, and humanitarian impact.

programme.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programme.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Elevation With Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Steven Furtick focuses on the strength of God in our everyday struggles.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Joseph Prince is a leading voice in proclaiming the gospel around the world through his ministry.

programme.title: Through the Bible With Les Feldick
programme.desc: Les Feldick, an Oklahoma farmer and rancher with a special gift for teaching the Bible; his simple and nondenominational approach on the program "Through the Bible with Les Feldick" has reached millions around the world with the Gospel of Grace.

programme.title: President and Christlove International Christian Ministries
Schambach Ministries
programme.desc: Donna Schambach continues the legacy of her father, RW Schambach, to reach all nations with the Good News of salvation through Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Touching Hands Ministries
programme.desc: With Darrell Dumas.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Maud Hoad leads her revenge-seeking family against Joe, who was forced to shoot treacherous Jeb Hoad.

programme.title: Man of the Frontier
programme.desc: At the end of an exhausting cattle drive, Gene Autry (Gene Autry) and his faithful sidekick, Frog Millhouse (Smiley Burnette), leave their herd at a train depot, where they meet the lovely Mary Baxter (Frances Grant) and her engineer father, George (Sam Flint). Impressed by their toughness, the Baxters recruit Autry and Millhouse to patrol the unsecured construction site of an important dam-building project plagued by accidents of a deadly and mysterious nature.

programme.title: Shine on Harvest Moon
programme.desc: At one time not so long ago, Milt Brower (William Farnum) and Pa Jackson (Stanley Andrews) were peaceable partners in a thriving cattle business. Now divided, the two are engaged in an embittered land dispute that turns ugly when Jackson accuses Brower of the dastardly crime of cattle rustling. Faithful cowboy Roy Rogers (Roy Rogers) steps in to defend his old friend Brower, making him a hero in the eyes of Brower's doting and dainty daughter, Claire (Mary Hart).

programme.title: Animal Rescue
programme.desc: A dog stuck under a shed; goslings caught in a house fire; relocating tigers; cat obesity.

programme.title: Dog Tales
programme.desc: Care and training; dogs in Los Angeles; breed profile: Maltese.

programme.title: Think Big
programme.desc: Children are the future -- and so are their inventions, which is why "Think Big" could be an important show. It features young inventors competing to see who can come up with the most-innovative invention. Each episode features two teams in the Think Tank -- a studio filled with art supplies and construction materials -- who brainstorm and choose materials before sketching, designing and building a prototype to be presented to a judge, who determines a winner. The champions earn bragging rights and the coveted Genius Cup.

programme.title: Biz Kids
programme.desc: Teaching financial education and entrepreneurship to a preteen audience; sketch comedy and young actors help explain basic economic concepts.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: America's Heartland
programme.desc: Much of the food Americans eat is produced by farmers and ranchers in the country's heartland, but many people don't know how it's produced. "America's Heartland" provides information about the people and processes responsible for the availability of food and fuel across the country and around the world. The show's reporters and producers tell stories in topics that include farm families, consumer issues, animal welfare and crop sustainability. Some episodes also take the show abroad to countries such as Egypt and Taiwan to show the impact American agriculture has on the global economy.

programme.desc: A confidence man tries to sell Jed the Hollywood Bowl, Griffith Park and the Hollywood Freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed is promoted to the position of bank vice president in order for him to participate in an interbank skeet shoot.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben Cartwright is the patriarch of an all-male Nevada ranching family. Set during and after the Civil War, "Bonanza" is the story of life on the family's thousand-acre spread, known as the Ponderosa, near Virginia City. Ben has his three sons, each with a different (and deceased) mother. Serious eldest son Adam hopes to follow in his father's footsteps; middle son Hoss is a gentle giant -- physically strong, but sometimes naive; and youngest son Little Joe is the most impetuous and romantic of the offspring.

programme.title: Howards End
programme.desc: (1992) Anthony Hopkins, Helena Bonham Carter and Emma Thompson star in James Ivory's adaptation of EM Forster's novel about two families, love, treachery and revenge.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: (1998) Elijah Wood and Morgan Freeman star in the sci-fi disaster movie about impending meteorite-related disaster, attempts to destroy it, and possibly some cataclysmic havoc.

programme.title: The Fabelmans
programme.desc: (2022) Steven Spielberg's semi-autobiographical coming-of-age drama about a young man who dreams of reshaping the world through the medium of film. With Michelle Williams and Seth Rogen.

programme.title: Mean Streets
programme.desc: (1973) Scorsese's classic crime drama about the ordinary lives of mafiosi - the boredom, casual violence and shattered dreams - in Little Italy, with Harvey Keitel and Robert De Niro.

programme.title: Little Monsters
programme.desc: (2019) Undead comedy horror with Lupita Nyong'o. Can an infantile slacker, a diligent teacher and a deranged children's TV presenter rescue a school trip from a zombie outbreak? Head count!

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: (1951) Western starring Randolph Scott. Four brothers leave the defeated South to seek jobs as the US recovers from the Civil War. As one becomes a railwayman, the others turn to crime.

programme.title: The Guns of Fort Petticoat
programme.desc: (1957) Western. A Union army deserter sets out to turn his Texan hometown's womenfolk into sharpshooters in order to repel a Comanche attack. Starring Audie Murphy and Kathryn Grant.

programme.title: The Caine Mutiny
programme.desc: (1954) Oscar-nominated Humphrey Bogart, in one of his finest roles, stars in Edward Dmytryk's gripping drama as Captain Philip Queeg, in charge of a US Navy minesweeper during the war.

programme.title: The Mark of Zorro
programme.desc: (1940) Swashbuckling action-adventure starring Tyrone Power. An aristocrat dons his mask and cape to fight for the rights of the poor in 19th-century California. With Basil Rathbone.

programme.title: The Lost City
programme.desc: (2022) Comedy adventure with Sandra Bullock and Channing Tatum. When a romance novelist is kidnapped wearing a pink jumpsuit, her hapless cover model heads to the jungle to rescue her.

programme.title: The King's Man
programme.desc: (2021) The spy-caper franchise continues with the origins story of the Kingsman agency, as a plucky group battle an international conspiracy at the outbreak of WWI. With Ralph Fiennes.

programme.title: Transporter 3
programme.desc: (2008) Violent action-thriller with Jason Statham. Terrorists hire a courier to drive a kidnapped woman across Europe, on a journey that gets ever more dangerous.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: (2017) Fantasy adventure starring Matt Damon and Willem Dafoe. In 11th-century China, Europeans seeking the secret of gunpowder are caught up in a war against alien monsters.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: All That Heaven Allows
programme.desc: (1955) Romantic drama with Jane Wyman and Rock Hudson. A wealthy widow decides to restart her life. But her children and her social set disapprove of her lover, forcing her to rethink.

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: (1957) Western starring Randolph Scott and John Carroll. A man seeking revenge for his wife's death tracks his rival down in the sleepy town of Sundown...

programme.title: Send Me No Flowers
programme.desc: (1964) Romcom starring Rock Hudson and Doris Day. Thinking he has just a few months to live, a man makes his wife suspect he's having an affair when he tries to find her a new partner.

programme.title: The Last Wagon
programme.desc: (1956) Western. Richard Widmark plays a man who murdered the killers of his wife and children and who becomes the unlikely saviour of a wagon train that's attacked by Apaches.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: (2012) Sci-fi action-adventure starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Rihanna. When aliens land spacecraft in the Pacific Ocean, only the US and Japanese navies can save Earth.

programme.title: Alice, Darling
programme.desc: (2022) Provocative psychological thriller with Anna Kendrick. A woman's friends stage an intervention to get her to see she's in a controlling relationship. But what will the boyfriend do?

programme.title: Ex Machina
programme.desc: (2013) Sci-fi thriller. A young programmer agrees to help a reclusive genius to test whether his lifelike android has consciousness, with dramatic results.

programme.title: Boss Level
programme.desc: (2020) Groundhog day shoot 'em up with Frank Grillo, Naomi Watts and Mel Gibson. Ray gets killed every day. Can he escape by unravelling the mystery of why a bunch of people want him dead?

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Magnificent Obsession
programme.desc: (1954) Douglas Sirk's melodrama starring Rock Hudson and Jane Wyman. A playboy reforms his lifestyle in order to seek forgiveness from a woman whose husband's death he inadvertently caused.

programme.title: The Major and the Minor
programme.desc: (1942) Ginger Rogers stars in this comedy of romantic misadventure. A woman poses as a girl to get a cheap rail fare. But things get awkward when she falls for a man who helps her out.

programme.title: D-Day the Sixth of June
programme.desc: (1956) Wartime romance set against the background of the D-Day landings, starring Robert Taylor and Dana Wynter. A married American officer embarks on an affair with English nurse.

programme.title: The Longest Day
programme.desc: (1962) War drama. Darryl F Zanuck's classic Oscar-winning recreation of the Allied landings in Normandy on 6 June 1944, with an all-star British, American, German and French cast.

programme.title: Commando
programme.desc: (1985) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger. To free his kidnapped daughter, an ex US commando must agree to assassinate a South American president. But he's not as pliant as he seems...

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: (2020) Fighty, satirical horror that upset Donald Trump. Hilary Swank plays a rich lefty who likes hunting working class people to the death. But she didn't reckon on Betty Gilpin.

programme.title: Hush
programme.desc: (2008) Thriller with William Ash and Christine Bottomley. A man is drawn into a deadly and gory cat-and-mouse game of survival when his girlfriend is abducted by a mysterious truck driver.

programme.title: The Warrior
programme.desc: (2001) Asif Kapadia's drama. In ancient India, a warrior - sick of killing for his master - heads to the Himalayas to find peace. But he pays a terrible price for this... In Hindi/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Frogmen
programme.desc: (1951) Second World War thriller. Richard Widmark, Dana Andrews and Robert Wagner star as divers with a special underwater demolition team taking the war to the Japanese in the Pacific.

programme.title: Bridge of Spies Interview Special
programme.desc: Director Steven Spielberg and stars Tom Hanks and Mark Rylance talk about making their Cold War espionage drama.

programme.title: Spies in Disguise
programme.desc: (2019) Animated spy comedy caper with the voice of Will Smith. The 'world's most awesome spy' gets framed and has to go undercover as a pigeon to prove his innocence.

programme.title: The Lavender Hill Mob
programme.desc: (1951) Classic Ealing comedy starring Alec Guinness as a mild-mannered bank clerk who assembles a gang to hijack a million quid's worth of gold. Which is when their problems really start...

programme.title: Sister Act
programme.desc: (1992) Comedy starring Whoopi Goldberg. A casino singer who witnesses a Mob murder goes into hiding at a convent, where she soon has the choir rocking. With Maggie Smith.

programme.title: Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit
programme.desc: (1993) Comedy sequel starring Whoopi Goldberg and Lauryn Hill. Deloris - who's now made it big in Vegas - goes back undercover as a teacher to help a struggling school choir find its voice.

programme.title: Braveheart
programme.desc: (1995) Mel Gibson stars in this Oscar-laden epic as William Wallace - Scottish freedom fighter, rousing orator and keen face painter - who led his army into England, threatening the throne.

programme.title: Benedetta
programme.desc: (2021) Paul Verhoeven's historical drama. Sex and the sacred collide as a Renaissance nun begins to have visions of Christ, while also taking a shine to one of her sisters. In French/subs.
